name: Netskope
description: Netskope Cloud Security REST API v2 for managing security policies, retrieving alerts and events, URL lists, and client management

actions.name: Get Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve security alerts including DLP, malware, policy violations, and compromised credentials

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Alert type: uba, securityassessment, quarantine, remediation, policy, malware, malsite, compromisedcredential, ctep, dlp, watchlist

parameters.name: timeperiod
parameters.description: Time period in seconds to query alerts for

actions.name: Get Events
actions.description: Retrieve security events including application, network, page, and audit events

parameters.name: event_type
parameters.description: Event type: application, audit, connection, incident, infrastructure, network, page

actions.name: List URL Lists
actions.description: Retrieve all URL lists used in web policies for blocking or allowing

actions.name: Update URL List
actions.description: Update a URL list to add or remove URLs for policy enforcement (block domains)

parameters.name: list_id
parameters.description: ID of the URL list to update

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Updated URL list including name and urls array

actions.name: Create URL List
actions.description: Create a new URL list for use in blocking or policy enforcement

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: URL list definition including name, type, and urls array

actions.name: List Clients
actions.description: Retrieve information about Netskope Client installations and status

actions.name: Get Steering Configuration
actions.description: Retrieve client steering configuration and profiles

actions.name: Get DLP Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve Data Loss Prevention incidents and policy violation details
